allow: PowerShell(cd "d:\\홈페이지\\caas-benchmark"; "=== .gitignore diff ==="; git diff .gitignore; "=== public/pdf 존재? ==="; Test-Path "public\\pdf"; "=== public/gif 용량 ==="; "{0:N1} MB" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem "public\\gif" -Recurse | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\); "=== 새 이미지 용량 합 ==="; "{0:N1} MB" -f \(\(Get-ChildItem "public\\images" -Recurse | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\))
PowerShell(cd "d:\\홈페이지\\caas-benchmark"; Get-ChildItem "public\\gif" -Recurse | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object @{N='MB';E={"{0:N1}" -f \($_.Length/1MB\)}}, Name)
